data.title: Skale launches BITE Protocol to eliminate malicious MEV attacks
data.description:
BITE encrypts data to prevent MEV bots from front-running, sniping or excluding transactions for their personal gain.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/353532/skale-proposes-bite-protocol-shield-transaction-data-prevent-mev-attacks?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SKALE Labs Reveals New Protocol to Combat $1.8 Billion MEV Problem
data.description:
SKALE Labs has launched its BITE Protocol, a consensus-level solution that eliminates MEV by preventing anybody from accessing transaction contents before a block is finalized. The post SKALE Labs Reveals New Protocol to Combat $1.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/skale-labs-reveals-new-protocol-to-combat-1-8-billion-mev-problem/

data.title: Policy Debate Emerges Over Presidential Crypto Holdings in Stablecoin Talks
data.description:
TL;DR Senate discussions on stablecoin legislation have become complicated due to President Trump’s crypto profits, with Democrats pushing to restrict his involvement. The crypto sector argues these restrictions would stifle innovation and U. S. leadership in digital finance
source: https://crypto-economy.com/policy-debate-emerges-over-presidential-crypto-holdings-in-stablecoin-talks/

data.title: ETH/BTH exchange rate hit a one-month high, up 9% on the day
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that as ETH rose above $2,000, the ETH/BTH exchange rate hit a one-month high, reaching a high of 0.02045, with a daily increase of 9%.

data.title: Backpack Exchange upgrades SOL asset lending service, lending SOL can enjoy up to 12.24% APY
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Backpack Exchange announced the upgrade of SOL asset lending service. Users can now obtain an annualized rate of return of up to 12.24% by lending SOL tokens, integrating lending, staking and perpetual contract staking functions. This rate of return is not based on subsidies, but is composed of real staking income and lending income. Users only need to deposit SOL and turn on the auto-lend function to participate, without additional operations.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 101,000 USDT with a 3.97% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 08, 2025, 15:40 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 101,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 101,000 USDT, with a narrowed 3.97% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Canadian Official Calls for Legislation on Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: According to PANews, Bank of Canada Deputy Governor Rogers has emphasized the need for new legislation in Canada to ensure proper safeguards if cryptocurrencies become a form of payment. Rogers highlighted the importance of establishing a legal framework to protect consumers and maintain financial stability as digital currencies gain traction.

data.title: Monad launches Testnet-2, mainly for validator node operators
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Monad announced the launch of Testnet-2, which will enhance the experimental testing environment for verification nodes to prepare for the main network. This test network is mainly for verification node operators, not ordinary users. Officials said that Testnet-2 will start running in late May for about 10 weeks, and plans to recruit 100 to 150 participants to join the test.
